title: BLDC Regenerative Braking Energy Recovery System
design_question: How to recover kinetic energy during braking to extend electric vehicle range?
selected_approach: Traction BLDC motor driven via 4-quadrant H-bridge or VESC ESC. On brake input, ESC switches to generation mode: back-EMF feeds current back to LiPo/LiFePO₄ battery. INA226 current/power monitor logs regenerated power on 1 Hz log.
rationale: Recovers 60–75 % of braking energy, extending range by 10–20 %. VESC ESC supports regenerative braking in firmware. INA226 telemetry validates efficiency and builds design-database evidence.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Dissipates all kinetic energy as heat—no recovery.
Faster charge/discharge than Li-Ion but lower energy density.

verification_notes: FACT: 'Regenerative Braking — BLDC Back-EMF Energy Recovery' confirms 60–75 % recovery efficiency.
supporting_fact_titles: Regenerative Braking — BLDC Back-EMF Energy Recovery
Brushless DC (BLDC) Motor for Suction Fan
Li-Ion Battery Capacity and Energy Calculation
